---
name: Security Concern
about: Report a security or trust concern, e.g. unsafe file handling, unexpected network activity, or risky permissions
title: "security: "
labels: security
---

## Summary

One or two sentences describing the concern.

## What you observed

What triggered the concern: unexpected network activity, a file being read/written somewhere unexpected, a permission request that seemed unnecessary, a trainer/script behaving suspiciously, etc.

## Why this is a concern

Explain the risk in plain terms (e.g. could expose credentials, could run unverified code, could modify files outside the expected folder).

## Steps to reproduce (if applicable)

1. Step one
2. Step two

## Environment

- App version: 
- OS: Windows `<Windows Version>`

## Additional context

Note: if this involves a serious exploit (e.g. remote code execution, credential theft), message the maintainer directly instead of posting details publicly. Use this template for lower-severity trust/safety concerns only.
